name: TaskBoard
tagline: Organize work, hit deadlines, and keep your whole team aligned
metaDescription: TaskBoard replaces Monday.com with kanban boards, Gantt charts, time tracking, and team workspaces — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🗂️</text></svg>

features.title: Kanban Boards
features.desc: Visualize workflows with drag-and-drop columns for every stage of your process. Move tasks from backlog to done and spot bottlenecks at a glance.

features.title: Gantt Charts
features.desc: Map out project timelines with dependency tracking between tasks. Drag bars to reschedule and watch downstream dates adjust automatically.

features.title: Time Tracking
features.desc: Start a timer on any task or log hours manually after the fact. Time reports break down where your team spends effort so you can plan future sprints accurately.

features.title: Team Workspaces
features.desc: Create separate workspaces for each department or client. Members see only their own projects, keeping focus tight and information secure.

features.title: Due Date Reminders
features.desc: Automatic notifications alert assignees when deadlines approach or pass. Escalation rules ping managers if high-priority tasks remain unfinished.

features.title: Workload Dashboard
features.desc: See each team member's assigned task count and capacity in a single view. Redistribute work before anyone becomes overloaded or underutilized.
